plugins.name: Media Player Now Playing
plugins.description: Displays the poster of the currently playing video from Plex, Jellyfin, or Emby. Fires real-time push events so it can act as a now-playing interrupt source on any scene.
plugins.author: Ryan Lane
plugins.changelog: fix Plex session polling to use /status/sessions (bare /sessions never reports playback)

plugins.name: Slow Movie Player
plugins.description: Plays video files one frame at a time at ultra-slow speeds, inspired by the Very Slow Movie Player concept. Supports quiet hours, per-movie timing, and random playback.
plugins.author: Ryan Lane
plugins.changelog: internal refactor to use shared mimir_utils; add model tests

plugins.name: Photo Frame
plugins.description: Gallery-based photo slideshow with intelligent image management. Supports multiple galleries, smart crop modes, and custom ordering.
plugins.author: Ryan Lane

plugins.name: Movie Posters
plugins.description: Displays random movie poster art from The Movie Database (TMDB). Supports genre sub-channels (Action, Horror, Sci-Fi…) and curated lists (Popular, Top Rated). Requires a free TMDB API key.
plugins.author: Ryan Lane
plugins.changelog: internal refactor to use shared mimir_utils; add model tests

plugins.name: Comic Covers
plugins.description: Displays random comic book and graphic novel covers from the Open Library archive. Supports subjects (graphic_novels, manga, etc.) and publisher facets (Marvel Comics, DC Comics, Image Comics) as sub-channels.
plugins.author: Ryan Lane
plugins.changelog: internal refactor to use shared mimir_utils; add model tests

plugins.name: Weather Display
plugins.description: Renders live weather conditions and forecasts as full-resolution images using OpenWeatherMap. Each configured city is an independent sub-channel; supports landscape, portrait, and square display layouts with dark/light themes. Requires a free OWM API key.
plugins.author: Ryan Lane
plugins.changelog: internal refactor to use shared mimir_utils; add model tests

plugins.name: Spotify Now Playing
plugins.description: Displays the currently playing Spotify track with album art and metadata. Supports push updates for instant display refresh when tracks change.
plugins.author: Ryan Lane
plugins.changelog: add now-playing interrupt metadata and cleared playback push payloads

plugins.name: Met Museum Art
plugins.description: Displays artworks from The Metropolitan Museum of Art's open collection. Browse by department, keyword search, or highlights gallery — no API key required. Supports multiple user-defined galleries as sub-channels.
plugins.author: Ryan Lane
plugins.changelog: internal refactor to use shared mimir_utils; add model tests

plugins.name: Headlines
plugins.description: Displays live news headlines from NewsAPI as full-resolution images. Each configured feed targets a category (Business, Tech, Sports…) or keyword search, rendered in a newspaper-style layout across landscape, portrait, and square displays. Supports dark, light, and high-contrast e-ink themes. Requires a free NewsAPI key.
plugins.author: Ryan Lane
plugins.changelog: internal refactor to use shared mimir_utils; add model tests

plugins.name: Last.fm Now Playing
plugins.description: Displays your currently scrobbling track from Last.fm with album art. Works with Apple Music, Spotify, or any Last.fm-connected player. Requires a free Last.fm API key.
plugins.author: Ryan Lane
plugins.changelog: add colorful no-art fallback: full light card w/ track info on square, gradient+title on other layouts

plugins.name: Generative Art
plugins.description: Gallery-grade algorithmic art rendered locally — no external APIs. Two print styles (Bauhaus × Wabi-Sabi giclée, 1960s constructivist risograph) across six composition algorithms, with static PNG for e-ink and seamless animated WebP loops for LCD/OLED displays.
plugins.author: Ryan Lane
plugins.changelog: add hex grid algorithm and named gallery sub-channels (assign different style/algorithm configs to different displays); replaces flat global settings
